title: Health Doubler
description: Double your health without all the hassle
body:
If you're anything like me, you want **extra health** in your modpack. But there can be too much hassle with editing config files and disabling features you don't want.

This mod offers a simple solution: it **doubles your hearts** and does **nothing else**. No extra items, no complicated settings, just more **HP** right out of the box.💖
